name: @checkai/desktop
description: Dedicated Electron desktop app for CheckAI
author: JosunLP <20913954+JosunLP@users.noreply.github.com>

scripts.build: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:electron
scripts.check: tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json --noEmit && vite build
scripts.pack: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --dir --publish never
scripts.dist: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --publish never
